name: DeepSeek-Math-V2
metaDescription: DeepSeek-Math-V2 (DeepSeek), released 2025-11-27 — part of the DeepSeek Math line. 685B model built on V3.2-Exp-Base using verifier-rewarded self-verification;…
overview: DeepSeek-Math-V2 is a large language model from DeepSeek, part of the DeepSeek Math line. Released 2025-11-27. Math-reasoning line; the latest V2 trains a verifier-guided self-checking prover that reaches IMO/CMO gold level.
What's notable in this version: 685B model built on V3.2-Exp-Base using verifier-rewarded self-verification; IMO 2025 and CMO 2024 gold-level, Putnam 2024 118/120. Apache-2.0.
